{{Infobox character
| name = Sha Relliar
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sha Relliar]] is [[Sha Miara]]'s [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Sha Relliar]] is a [[Herald]] and the Right Hand of the [[Luminous Queen]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Sha Relliar]] is [[Sha Miara]]'s uncle.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
